# RepuAgent — Smart Link France

## What is RepuAgent?
RepuAgent is an AI-powered Google review management platform for local businesses in France. It automatically generates professional responses to Google reviews in less than 2 minutes, 24/7, in the tone of the business owner.

## Company
- Name: Smart Link France
- Product: RepuAgent
- Website: https://agent.gosmartlink.app
- Country: France
- Language: French (also supports Arabic, English, Spanish)

## What RepuAgent does
- Automatically generates AI responses to Google reviews
- Supports restaurants, hair salons, bakeries, cafes, kebab shops and all local businesses
- Sends instant alerts for negative reviews (1-2 stars)
- Provides a complete dashboard with rating evolution charts
- Generates social media captions for Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, LinkedIn
- Sends automated monthly performance reports
- Available as a PWA (Progressive Web App)

## Target customers
Local business owners in France, especially:
- Restaurants and food businesses
- Hair salons and beauty businesses
- Bakeries and pastry shops
- Cafes and bars
- Any local commerce receiving Google reviews

## Pricing
- 29€/month
- 14-day free trial (no charge until day 15)
- No commitment, cancel anytime

## Key URLs
- Main app: https://agent.gosmartlink.app
- Free demo (no signup): https://agent.gosmartlink.app/demo.html
- Landing page: https://agent.gosmartlink.app/landing.html

## Key features
1. AI review response generator (powered by Claude AI)
2. Google Business Profile integration
3. Negative review email alerts
4. Rating evolution charts
5. Saved response templates
6. Visual content library (Pexels integration)
7. Social media caption generator
8. Automated monthly reports
9. PWA — installable on mobile

## Why RepuAgent?
- 88% of customers read review responses before choosing a business
- Responding to a negative review within 24h increases the chance of the customer changing their rating by 33%
- Google's local algorithm favors businesses that actively respond to reviews
- RepuAgent saves business owners 2-3 hours per week

## Contact
- Support: WhatsApp +33 7 64 46 73 00
- Email: alertes@gosmartlink.app
